title: Research — Phase 1
description: Turn scattered customer signals, interviews, and analytics into a clear ICP, message, and market thesis. The foundation every channel and landing page inherits.
audience: Best for post-PMF B2B SaaS and AI teams ($1M–$10M ARR) where the product works but the message keeps drifting. Retainer from £5k/mo.
promise: You leave with the words, buying triggers, objections, and proof points your growth system should be built around.
outcomes: Customer language library (exact phrasing from interviews and calls)
Sharper ICP, buying committee map, and trigger list
Message architecture that pages, ads, and sales can all share
process: Audit the current funnel, CRM notes, call recordings, reviews, and sales material
Run structured interviews with target customers, users, and lost opportunities
Cluster patterns into pains, triggers, objections, and proof points
Translate findings into a message architecture campaigns and sales can share
